name: happyskills-design
description: HappySkills skill design and quality — author new skills, audit existing ones, update from session learnings, and create kits with full Claude Code spec + HappySkills conventions.

capabilities.summary: design and scaffold a new skill
intents: start building a skill for X

capabilities.summary: review or audit an existing skill for quality and best practices (no CLI command; an authoring workflow)
intents: check my SKILL.md for best practices

capabilities.summary: update a skill from session learnings or refine its content (no CLI command; an authoring workflow)
intents: update this skill based on what we did
apply session learnings to a skill

capabilities.summary: create and edit kits that bundle multiple skills (no CLI command; an authoring workflow)
intents: add or remove a skill from my kit

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
